name: curriculum-designer-chain
description: Design a structured, multi-level learning curriculum from any topic with prerequisites, learning path, resources, exercises, and assessments.

entry_inputs.topic: string (required) - The subject or skill to design a curriculum for
entry_inputs.target_audience: string (optional) - Who will follow this curriculum
entry_inputs.domain_context: string (optional) - Industry, field, or specialization context
entry_inputs.time_constraints: string (optional) - Total time available for curriculum completion
